subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Thy remembrance hath ever been before the Most Great Horizon, and thy name hath been inscribed in the Tablets. Therefore it behoveth thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله ذکرت همیشه در منظر اکبر بوده و اسمت در الواح مذکور لذا سزاوار است
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @suffering and imprisonment
